warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Project for 35 elevators at 13 stations with 15-year maintenance agreement and two renewal options

Construction, maintenance, and operation of three overhead catenary structures at Concrete Plant Park, Bronx along Amtrak's Hell Gate Line. Includes permanent acquisitions for stations, electrical substations, and ROW augmentations.
Reconstruct, expand, and modernize the Jamaica Bus Depot located at 165-18 Tuskegee Airmen Way in Queens. Requires temporary bus parking at CUNY York College.
Lease with Greater Jamaica Development Corporation for new Jamaica Bus Terminal at 90-01 168th Street, Queens, with subleases to Nassau County/NICE Bus and NYPD
Acquisition of property interests by negotiated settlement or eminent domain for landfill remediation on LIRR right-of-way in Brookhaven
MTA Finance Committee Meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Boardroom from 8:30 AM - 12:00 PM ET
MTA Finance Committee Meeting at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room scheduled at 2:00 PM, adjourned at 3:34 PM
Issuance of $764,950,000 Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Refunding Green Bonds, Series 2023A
MTA executed a hedge of ultra-low sulfur diesel fuel on approximately 2,826,765 gallons at an all-in price of $2.7030/gallon
